subcategory: WebGL WebGPU animated tubes cursor effect
use_cases: Landing page hero section with interactive 3D cursor animation
Creative portfolio showcase with colorful WebGL tube effects
Entertainment platform background with dynamic light tubes
Interactive agency website with cursor-following visual effects
Dev tools or SaaS landing page with modern 3D decoration
ai_summary: A WebGL/WebGPU-powered animated tube cursor effect that renders colorful 3D tubes following the mouse cursor with dynamic lighting. Features click-to-randomize color functionality and customizable tube and light colors through props. Built on threejs-components library for smooth GPU-accelerated rendering.
